race.comment: BREEZIN' (1) has been thereabouts recently, the latest result a fourth beaten 0.9 lengths at Doomben over 1200m. Will find this assignment much easier and is likely to feature. KIRKSVILLE (3) showed good pace and went on to score by 1.2 lengths when resuming last time out over 1100m at Gatton. Drawn to enjoy a good run on the speed. Well placed and there is no reason why he cannot salute again. UCELLE (18) strips fitter second-up from the spell and has placed around this circuit. Can feature with any luck in running. RED CODE (6) has a win and a second from two first-up efforts and may run a race while fresh.
